# protonpass_vault (Resource)

Manages a Proton Pass vault.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "protonpass_vault" "example" {
  name = "My Vault"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the vault.

### Read-Only

- `share_id` (String) Share ID of the vault (unique identifier).
- `vault_id` (String) Internal vault ID.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Vaults can be imported by specifying the share ID
terraform import protonpass_vault.example "share_id"
```
